must_detect.matched_text: Retention: HR files 7 years post-termination; financing/loan documentation 10 years; exchange-related disclosures retained indefinitely; backups auto-expire after 180 days.
This notice may be revised in line with guidance from the Personal Data Protection Commissioner and the Exchange; it is not intended to create contractual rights.

Transfers: limited cross-border processing to Seri Cloud Sdn Bhd (processor) in SG; safeguards per PDPA s.129 with contractual clauses, access controls, and audit logs.
Retention: HR files 7 years post-termination; financing/loan documentation 10 years; exchange-related disclosures retained indefinitely; backups auto-expire after 180 days.
MNPI handling: board papers, valuations, and draft term sheets are restricted; CMSA s.188 and Bursa Listing Requirements 9.03/14.08 apply during closed periods.
Only authorised insiders (role-only: Company Secretary, Head of Legal) may access the VDR; do not circulate price-sensitive drafts via messaging apps.
Submit DSARs at https://mawardata.my/dsar?ref=MAWAR-0999&req=800101-14-1234 or by email to dp o@mawardata.my; include a reachable number (+60 16 345 7788).
Physical DSARs may be delivered to the KL office; any public information line is for general enquiries only and is not processed as a personal data request.
This notice may be revised in line with guidance from the Personal Data Protection Commissioner and the Exchange; it is not intended to create contractual rights.
